title: aquilegia vulgaris var. cyclophylla
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. cyclophylla, also known as the Granny's Bonnet or Aquilegia, is a plant species within the buttercup family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever, coughs, and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create a soothing and calming effect.
